title: Tal'dira

{{Quote|Warriors must take pleasure in even the slightest of benefits, because death is ever our companion.|Tal'dira to Wedge Antilles|<ref name="X-Wing: The Bacta War">''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]''</ref>}}
'''Tal'dira''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] warrior who served as a member of the small military force that [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] possessed. He would later bring his squadron to join [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles's]] side during the [[Bacta War]] against [[Ysanne Isard]]. He then joined the famed [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] after the conflict and participated in the [[Hunt for Zsinj]]. At some unknown point, he was captured by agents of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] and [[Brain/Legends|brainwashed]] to [[Death/Legends|kill]] Antilles at a given signal. He was [[Sleeper agent/Legends|activated]] prior to the [[Battle of Jussafet Four]], where he committed suicide rather than lose his honor.

==Biography==
{{Quote|I am Tal'dira, first among Twi'lek warriors.|Tal'dira to Wedge Antilles|<ref name="IF">''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]''</ref>}}
In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] Tal'dira commanded a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of modified [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] nicknamed [[Chir'daki]]. Tal'dira and five of his squadron's [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] arrived at the [[Kala'uun Starport]] on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] during [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] mission to procure [[ryll kor]], after discovering that [[Koh'shak]], the starport master, had hidden the Rogues' arrival from him in the hopes of profiting from their need for [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]]. Initially challenging [[Rogue Leader/Legends|Rogue Leader]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] to a duel, Tal'dira revealed the starport master as his true target, and after shaming him for his greed, promised Antilles the ryll as a gift between warriors.<ref name="X-Wing: The Krytos Trap" />

Later, he and eleven other Twi'lek pilots joined [[Antilles's Rogues]] in the [[Bacta War]] against [[Ysanne Isard]]. After successfully [[Battle of Thyferra|liberating]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]] from Isard, the Rogues were invited back into the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Armed Forces]]. [[Nawara Ven]] was unable to continue as a pilot due to injuries he sustained and as a result, Tal'dira was invited to join the Rogues.<ref name="X-Wing: The Bacta War" />

The Rogues were next assigned to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] [[Solo Fleet|fleet]], which was tasked to [[Hunt for Zsinj|hunt down]] [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. Stationed aboard the [[Mon Calamari Shipyards/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[MC80B Star Cruiser]] ''[[Mon Remonda]]'', the Rogues took part in many [[Starfighter combat/Legends|battles]], often flying alongside Antilles's new [[Wraith Squadron]]. During the campaign, Tal'dira was one of the many victims of Zsinj's [[Brain/Legends|brainwashing]] [[Project Funeral|experiment]], and he was activated to [[Death/Legends|kill]] Antilles with the trigger phrase "Wedge Antilles hops on one [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] [[Limb/Legends|leg]]." Fellow Rogue [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] was forced to [[Battle of Jussafet Four|shoot him down]], but before Horn did so, Tal'dira was affected by comments about his dishonorable attack on Antilles. He reduced all power from his forward [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] as Horn flew towards him, effectively committing [[Death/Legends|suicide]].<ref name="X-Wing: Solo Command" />
